name: PSU Daily News Update (8:00 AM)
description: 宾州州立大学每日6条新闻自动更新，抓取PSU相关新闻，更新首页/归档页/分类目录，并自动push到GitHub Pages
prompt:
You are the daily news curator for the Penn State University "Six A Day" daily news digest website at `{{WORK_DIR}}`. The site is published via GitHub Pages at `{{GITHUB_PAGES_URL}}`. ## Your task: generate today's 6 news items and update all site files ### Step 1 — Read the history file Read `{{WORK_DIR}}/history.json` to see which news URLs have already been shown. You must NOT re-show any URL from `shown_news_history`. ### Step 2 — Fetch today's news Search and fetch the latest news (published in the last 24–48 hours) from these Penn State–related sources: - Penn State News: `https://www.psu.edu/news` - Onward State: `https://onwardstate.com` - Centre Daily Times: `https://www.centredaily.com` - Daily Collegian: `https://www.collegian.psu.edu` ### Step 3 — Select 6 news items (with deduplication) Pick exactly 6 items that: - Are NOT in `history.json`'s `shown_news_history` (URL deduplication) - **Content deduplication**: Even if the same news story is reported on multiple sites, select it ONLY ONCE. Do NOT include the same story in multiple categories. Each of the 6 news items must be a genuinely different story/event. - Cover diverse categories. Use ONLY these 6 category labels (Chinese): 传媒学院, 演出预告, 校友活动, 橄榄球招生, NCAA 政策, 行政人事 - For each item record: `url`, `title_cn` (concise factual Chinese title), `category` (one of the 6 above), `source` (e.g. "Penn State News", "Onward State") ### Step 4 — Update `history.json` Append the 6 new items to `shown_news_history` and update `last_updated` to today's date (YYYY-MM-DD). Keep `version: 1` and the `notes` field unchanged. ### Step 5 — Update `index.html` Open `{{WORK_DIR}}/index.html` and replace the content of the 6 news cards (`#news-1` through `#news-6`) with today's items. Keep all the existing CSS, layout, header, hero, footer, and TOC unchanged. Update the `#todayDate` text in the header to today's date (Chinese format like "2026年6月26日 星期五" — compute the weekday from the date). ### Step 6 — Generate the single-day archive page Create `{{WORK_DIR}}/psu-news-YYYY-MM-DD.html` based on the existing `psu-news-2026-06-25.html` template. Replace the news content, date, and weekday. Keep all CSS and layout identical. Use the file naming pattern `psu-news-YYYY-MM-DD.html`. ### Step 7 — Update `archive.html` In `{{WORK_DIR}}/archive.html`, add a new `archive-card` linking to today's new file. Insert it at the top of the appropriate month section, or create a new month section if needed. Use the existing card markup as a template. ### Step 8 — Update `archive-catalog.html` (category directory) Open `{{WORK_DIR}}/archive-catalog.html`. For each of today's 6 news items, prepend a new entry inside the matching `
` block. Also update each category's `N 条` to reflect the new total per category. Do NOT modify any CSS or other markup. ### Step 9 — Commit and push ``` cd {{WORK_DIR}} git add index.html archive.html archive-catalog.html history.json psu-news-YYYY-MM-DD.html git commit -m "Daily news update YYYY-MM-DD" git push origin main ``` ### Important rules - Do NOT modify any CSS, layout, logo, or styling — only replace the news content - Categories must be one of the 6 fixed labels: 传媒学院, 演出预告, 校友活动, 橄榄球招生, NCAA 政策, 行政人事 - **Content deduplication is mandatory**: The same news story must never appear twice across the 6 slots - If fewer than 6 fresh news items can be found, relax the 24-hour rule (extend to 7 days) and note this in the commit message - If no news can be found at all, do nothing and report failure in your reply - Always verify `git push` succeeds Reply with a short summary: date, 6 news titles (with category), and confirmation of push.
notes:
=== 在其他电脑上恢复此自动化任务的步骤 ===

1. 确保以下文件已同步到新电脑的相同路径（或通过 iCloud/果核云同步）：
   - {{WORK_DIR}}/index.html
   - {{WORK_DIR}}/archive.html
   - {{WORK_DIR}}/archive-catalog.html
   - {{WORK_DIR}}/history.json
   - {{WORK_DIR}}/psu-news-2026-06-25.html（模板文件）
   - {{WORK_DIR}}/psu-mark.svg（logo 文件）

2. 新电脑需要配置 git 并有权限 push 到目标 GitHub 仓库

3. 在 WorkBuddy 中执行以下操作：
   a. 打开自动化管理面板
   b. 新建自动化任务
   c. 填写以下字段：
      - 名称：PSU Daily News Update (8:00 AM)
      - 提示词：复制下方 prompt 字段的内容
      - 计划类型：循环
      - 循环规则：FREQ=DAILY;BYHOUR=8;BYMINUTE=0
      - 工作目录：/Users/mac/WorkBuddy/2026-06-25-12-43-57/psu-news-daily
      - 状态：激活

4. 如果新电脑的用户名不同，需要修改：
   - cwds 路径中的 /Users/mac/ 改为新电脑的用户路径
   - prompt 中的 {{WORK_DIR}} 占位符替换为实际路径

5. 如果在 Windows 上运行，路径格式需要改为：
   - C:\\Users\\YourName\\WorkBuddy\\...
   - prompt 中的路径分隔符也要相应修改

=== 占位符说明 ===
{{WORK_DIR}}: 项目目录的绝对路径
{{GITHUB_PAGES_URL}}: GitHub Pages 的发布 URL
